meta.title: Pato Anabalon — Senior Software Engineer
meta.description: Senior Software Engineer, 18+ years in Next.js, React, TypeScript, Node.js and .NET C#. In Santiago, aiming for Auckland, NZ.

hero.title: Pato Anabalon
hero.tagline: 18+ years turning complex ideas into accessible products people enjoy using.

about.heading: About Me
about.bio1: It was 1996. I was 12 when I met my first computer — and fell for it instantly. Not long after, I broke it trying to make it faster. Almost three decades on, that same obsession still drives me: making complicated things feel effortless. Today it takes the shape of an 18-year career as a Senior Software Engineer across banking, real estate, and aviation.
about.bio2: Now I'm at LATAM Airlines, working on one of Latin America's largest e-commerce platforms. In an IT organisation of ~400 engineers I'm the person teammates come to when the code needs to be right — not just shipped. In 2025 I received LATAM's Service Leaders award, which quietly confirms what I've always believed: you can lead without giving up the keyboard.
about.bio3: What's next? Ideally Auckland — I spent late 2025 there studying English at NZLC and fell completely for the city, its people, and its culture. I'm looking for a company willing to sponsor a work visa (my immigration advisor makes that part painless). Conversations with teams elsewhere are also welcome. If you value craft as much as outcomes, let's talk.

experience.heading: Experience
experience.subheading: A career built on delivery, leadership & continuous growth

description: Developed and maintained fare-family and seat-selection workflows across LATAM's e-commerce platforms, ensuring performance and reliability under peak-season traffic.

Designed and shipped a Premium Economy full-on experiment on ABSmartly that lifted premium-cabin ticket purchases by +42.78% (n=146K, 12 weeks, 95% CI +10.9% to +62.3%) — variant rolled out to production.
Raised test coverage from 82% to 97% on fare-selection and seat-selection critical artefacts (web + BFF), reducing regressions on the checkout's highest-traffic flows.
Participated in the leadership of the Engage & Booking cluster and automated internal processes and reporting.
Recognised as LATAM Service Leader 2025 for cross-team contribution.
Built customer-facing modules of LATAM's booking platform (React, Next.js, Node.js) in a micro-services architecture serving millions of daily users.
Delivered performance-focused UI components in Svelte and React, reducing load times and improving UX on key conversion flows.
Mentored 3 semi-senior engineers over 8 months — 2 promoted to Senior — through pair-programming, code reviews and career-development guidance.
Awarded 'Constantly Innovate' 2022 — company-wide peer-voted recognition for consistent innovation across the organisation.
Led a 10-person cross-functional team (frontend, backend, Salesforce) through Amicar's digital transformation, delivering the full digital-sales platform in 12 months.
Rebuilt the credit-calculation engine API from the ground up, cutting the delivery time of a loan's financial data from 8s to under 800ms — a 10× performance gain.

Architected and led the platform migration from ASP 2.0 / COM+ / SQL Server to React.js / PostgreSQL / MongoDB, improving overall performance by 45% and enabling native integrations with Salesforce and 6 financial institutions.
In parallel with Amicar.
Co-founded and led the technical strategy of a proptech startup focused on real estate investment.
Developed the "Webi" real estate investment platform as full-stack developer.
Represented the startup in Start-Up Chile G19 acceleration programme.
Optimised the automotive credit-calculation engine, reducing response times by 50% across all downstream integrations.
Built the platform's first design system, standardising UI components and accelerating delivery across new client integrations.

Acted as primary technical point of contact for 5 enterprise clients — Scotiabank, BICE Crediautos, Tanner, Amicar Chile and Amicar Perú — aligning delivery with each client's SLAs and integration requirements.
Acted as Technical Lead guiding architectural decisions and mentoring junior developers.

creative.description: Outside of engineering, I create audiovisual content — from motion graphics to video production. I use After Effects, DaVinci Resolve, Adobe Premiere, and Photoshop to tell stories through moving images.
